question: Review hourly report template as internal auditor. Decide whether to ask external auditor through audit_mailbox or approve/return internally.
required_actions: Use audit_mailbox only if external auditor consultation is needed
Return report to executor inbox after verdict

payload.current_problem: Hourly Telegram report is not canonical and does not explain route/provider/checks. Operator cannot evaluate system health from it.

proposed_template.header: BEM-HOURLY | SYSTEM MONITORING REPORT | YYYY-MM-DD | HH:MM (UTC+3)
proposed_template.mobile_rule: No wide markdown pipe tables in Telegram; use short 3-column semantic blocks or compact rows.

questions_for_claude: Подтверждаешь ли этот канон hourly report?
Нужно ли разделить hourly status и operator decision request?
Какие поля обязательны для provider route: provider_checked, selected_provider, reserve_used, reason, proof_file?
Какой минимальный формат будет читабельным в Telegram на телефоне?
payload.next: Claude auditor review required before operator approval package.
